title: Fluorescence imaging reversion using spatially variant deconvolution.
author: Anastasopoulou M Gorpas D Koch M Liapis E Glasl S Klemm U Karlas A Lasser T Ntziachristos V
content: S-EPMC6889134 PMC6889134 Fluorescence imaging reversion using spatially variant deconvolution. Fluorescence imaging opens new possibilities for intraoperative guidance and early cancer detection, in particular when using agents that target specific disease features.
